titleStmt.title: SII 23.480: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 480. (A.R. No. 480 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram taluk, Tanjavur District Ōṅkārēśvara temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 35: 1212-13 A.D.

summary.p: The details of date are Mīna, śu. 4, Tuesday, Kārttigai, which are however irregular. This also begins with the same indication about the introduction Puyal vāyttu etc. Along with the main part are found four other disconnected pieces which however should have belonged to this inscription, which seems to register the remission of taxes granted by the ūravar (assembly) of Pallavanārayaṇapuram in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu on some land endowed by them as tirunāmattukkāṇi and ūrkkiḻ-iṟaiyili to the temple of Ōṅkārīśvaramuḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
haraḥ-svastiśrīḥ puyal vāyttu maṇ vaḷara Eṉkiṟa pāṭṭu Eḻuti tiripu vaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyum koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulottuṅkacoḻade
vaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 5Āvatu miṉa nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu caturtthiyum cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa kāttikai nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷa nāṭṭu tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭup pallavanā
rāyaṇapuramāṉa Ulakamātevipurattu Ūravarom kuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Āḷu yappallavaraiyar kuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ brahmadeśattu Eḻuntaruḷivitta Uṭai
yār Oṅkāriśvaramuṭaiyārkku tirunāmattukkāṇiyum Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyili yum ttukku pramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Ippal lavanārāya
ṇapurattu Ūrppotuvil kuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟ
ḷvāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ ccaṉ Iṟaiyilikku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai kuḷattūruṭaiyāṉ tirumañcaṉa kollai nilattukku tteṟkum Āka Icai
nta Innāṉ kellai Uḷ naṭuvuppaṭṭa nilam100nilam

la nilam pajha Innilam Orumāvaraiyum kāṇiyum Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyum Āka viṭṭu Innilantukku Ūrmāvinta cilvari peruvari Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa Ūrile nāṅkaḷe Eṟṟi Iṟuttu Anta rāyampāṭ
ṭam tavirakkaṭavomākavum Innilam Oru māvaraiyum Innāyaṉārkku candrādityavaṟ kāṇiyum Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyumākac ceytu kuṭut tom Ippallavanārāyaṇapurattu Ūravaro
kuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅkak kāṇiyum Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyumāka nirvārttuk kuṭuttom Innilattukku
tukku Ivarkaḷ veṇṭiṉapote piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭukkak kaṭa vomākavum kuṭukka māṭṭuttilomākil Ippira

māṇa Icaivutiṭṭu piramāṇa māvutākavum Ippaṭi sammatittuk kāṇi yum Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyuñ ceytu kuṭuttom Iv Oṅkāriśvaramu ṭaiyār koyil Āti caṇṭeśvaradevarkkum pallava
nārāyaṇapuramāna Ulakamātevipurattu Ūravarom Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Ippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr kaṇakkuk kāvaṉūru ṭaiyāṉ coṉṉavāṟṟivāṉṉakkapirāṉ Eḻuttu Iṉṉam—
Digital edition of SII 23.480 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
